prompt: Editorial premium magazine cover composition, 4:5 vertical format. Background: deep forest black #000F08. Foreground: precise 3x3 grid layout filling the canvas, NO visible gutters or lines between cells (cells must be flush/touching). Exactly 5 of the 9 grid cells filled with abstract microscopic biological textures in emerald #2D7A5C, medium teal #557D6D, and sage #91B69D — think cellular structures, mitochondrial cristae, blood vessel cross-sections, protein folds — extremely abstract, painterly, no medical iconography. The other 4 cells remain pure #000F08 black. Overlay typography: in the central-left grid cell, a massive numeral '5' in DM Sans Bold 700, color gold #C89136, kerning -0.04em, dominating that cell. In the central-right cell, three lines of text stacked left-aligned in off-white #f8fffc (NEVER pure white), DM Sans Light 300, letter-spacing -0.02em: line 1 'números' / line 2 'que o exame anual' / line 3 'não pede.' NO logo on this cover. Aesthetic: Kinfolk meets scientific journal cover, restrained, editorial, sophisticated. ABSOLUTELY NO: red, amber, orange colors; pure white #FFFFFF; bullet points; medical icons; lab coats; gauges; smartwatch mockups; drop shadows; bevels; neon glow; people; hands; faces; horizontal divider lines; visible gutters between grid cells.
notes: Cover. No logo. Hero typographic piece with 3x3 microscopic grid.

prompt: Editorial premium magazine spread, 4:5 vertical format. Background: solid deep forest black #000F08, completely clean, no textures. Top of canvas (~12% from top), centered: italic small text 'A watch list.' in DM Sans Light 300, off-white #f8fffc, letter-spacing -0.02em. Center of canvas: a clean monospaced-feeling left-aligned list with generous vertical spacing between rows, three columns visually aligned. Numbers '01' '02' '03' '04' '05' in gold #C89136 DM Sans Regular 400. Marker names ('hs-CRP', 'Ferritina', 'ApoB', 'Insulina em jejum', 'IGF-1') in off-white #f8fffc DM Sans Light 300, ~32pt. Descriptors ('inflamação', 'reserva de ferro', 'partículas aterogênicas', 'sensibilidade insulínica', 'eixo de longevidade') in off-white #f8fffc at 60% opacity, DM Sans Light 300, smaller ~18pt, aligned in a third column. Bottom area (~75% down): small italic line in off-white #f8fffc DM Sans Light 300 at 70% opacity: 'Faixa funcional ≠ faixa normal.' Reserve clean horizontal space at bottom-center, ~5% padding from bottom edge, ~25% canvas width, for a logo to be composited later (leave empty black space there). Aesthetic: typographic editorial, restrained, scientific journal cover meets Aesop product card. ABSOLUTELY NO: red, amber, orange; pure white; bullet points; icons; lab coats; gauges; drop shadows; neon; people; horizontal divider lines.
notes: Logo overlaid post-process. Reserve bottom-center clean space.

prompt: Editorial biomarker detail slide, 4:5 vertical format. Background: solid deep forest black #000F08, completely clean. Top-left area (~8% from top, left-aligned with ~8% left margin): small gold '01' in gold #C89136, DM Sans Regular 400, ~22pt. Just below '01': large marker name 'hs-CRP' in DM Sans Light 300, off-white #f8fffc, ~52pt, letter-spacing -0.02em. Directly below, smaller subline 'inflamação sistêmica de baixo grau' in off-white #f8fffc at 70% opacity, DM Sans Light 300, ~20pt. Middle of canvas: a data block, left-aligned, two rows. Row 1: label 'Faixa de laboratório' in DM Sans Regular 400 off-white at 70% opacity, then value '< 3.0 mg/L' in DM Sans Light 300 off-white #f8fffc, aligned right of label with generous tab spacing. Row 2: label 'Faixa funcional Longevify' in DM Sans Regular 400 gold #C89136, then value '< 1.0 mg/L' in DM Sans Light 300 off-white #f8fffc. Lower-middle (~62% down): an editorial italic insight block in Georgia italic, off-white #f8fffc, ~18pt, line-height 1.5, left-aligned, max width ~75% of canvas: 'O PR que não vem mesmo com plano impecável. A recuperação que ficou meio passo mais lenta. Quando o corpo inflama por dentro, o treino sente antes do exame anual.' Footer (~88% down, centered): micro italic disclaimer 'Faixas funcionais baseadas em evidência atlética, não em medianas populacionais.' in DM Sans Light 300, off-white at 60% opacity, ~10pt. Reserve bottom-center clean black space ~5% padding from bottom, ~25% canvas width, for logo overlay. Aesthetic: scientific journal monograph page, Aesop product card restraint. ABSOLUTELY NO: red, amber, orange; pure white #FFFFFF; bullets; medical icons; lab coats; gauges; smartwatch; drop shadows; bevels; neon glow; people; hands; faces; horizontal divider lines inside the card; charts; graphs.
notes: Slide 3 — hs-CRP detail. Logo overlaid post-process.

prompt: Editorial biomarker detail slide, 4:5 vertical format. Background: solid deep forest black #000F08, completely clean. Top-left (~8% from top, ~8% left margin): small gold '02' in gold #C89136, DM Sans Regular 400, ~22pt. Below: large marker 'Ferritina' in DM Sans Light 300, off-white #f8fffc, ~52pt, letter-spacing -0.02em. Below: subline 'reserva de ferro' in off-white at 70% opacity, DM Sans Light 300, ~20pt. Middle: data block, left-aligned, two rows. Row 1: label 'Faixa de laboratório' DM Sans Regular 400 off-white 70% opacity, value '15–300 ng/mL (M) · 30–400 ng/mL (H)' DM Sans Light 300 off-white #f8fffc. Row 2: label 'Faixa funcional Longevify' DM Sans Regular 400 gold #C89136, value '50–150 ng/mL' DM Sans Light 300 off-white #f8fffc. Em endurance, a queda subclínica chega como fadiga inespecífica e VO2max em retração antes do hemograma piscar.' Footer (~88% down, centered): micro italic 'Faixas funcionais baseadas em evidência atlética, não em medianas populacionais.' DM Sans Light 300, off-white 60% opacity, ~10pt. Reserve bottom-center clean black space ~5% padding, ~25% width, for logo. Aesthetic: scientific journal monograph. ABSOLUTELY NO: red, amber, orange; pure white; bullets; medical icons; lab coats; gauges; smartwatch; drop shadows; bevels; neon; people; faces; hands; horizontal divider lines; charts.

Editorial biomarker detail slide, 4:5 vertical format. Background: solid deep forest black #000F08, completely clean. Top-left (~7% from top, ~8% left margin): small gold '05' in gold #C89136, DM Sans Regular 400, ~22pt. Row 2: label 'Faixa funcional Longevify' DM Sans Regular 400 gold #C89136, value spans two lines: line 1 'janela estreita, ajustada por idade', line 2 'biológica e carga de treino' both in DM Sans Light 300 off-white #f8fffc. Mid-lower (~55% down): Georgia italic editorial, off-white #f8fffc, ~18pt, line-height 1.5, left-aligned, max width ~75%: 'Janela estreita. Muito alto sinaliza risco oncológico de longo prazo. Below italic block (~80% down): a thin horizontal gold line #C89136 ~30% canvas width, left-aligned, then CTA below in DM Sans Light 300 off-white #f8fffc ~14pt line-height 1.4: 'Longevify mede esses 5 + 95 marcadores.' / 'A AI lê o número antes do treino, não três semanas depois.' Reserve bottom-center clean black space ~5% padding, ~25% width, for logo. Aesthetic: scientific monograph closing page. ABSOLUTELY NO: red, amber, orange; pure white; bullets; medical icons; lab coats; gauges; smartwatch; drop shadows; bevels; neon; people; faces; hands; horizontal divider lines other than the single thin gold one above CTA; charts.
